api.name: api
api.description: Full FPP REST API (253 ops from OpenAPI). Use: api <tag> <command>.

api.backups.get-configuration-list-devic.name: get-configuration-list-devicename
api.backups.get-configuration-list-devic.description: Get list of JSON backups on device

api.backups.get-list-devicename.name: get-list-devicename
api.backups.get-list-devicename.description: Get list of backups on device

api.call.name: call
api.call.description: Call any operation by id (from api list).

api.pipewire.get-control-groups.name: get-control-groups
api.pipewire.get-control-groups.description: List output groups with live state

api.pipewire.get-control-groups-id.name: get-control-groups-id
api.pipewire.get-control-groups-id.description: Get one output group with live state

api.pipewire.post-control-groups-id-memb.name: post-control-groups-id-members-cardid-mute
api.pipewire.post-control-groups-id-memb.description: Mute or unmute a member sound card

api.pipewire.post-control-groups-id-mute.name: post-control-groups-id-mute
api.pipewire.post-control-groups-id-mute.description: Mute or unmute an output group

api.pipewire.post-control-input-groups-i.name: post-control-input-groups-id-members-memberindex-mute
api.pipewire.post-control-input-groups-i.description: Mute or unmute an input-group member

api.pipewire.post-control-routing-inputg.name: post-control-routing-inputgroupid-outputgroupid-mute
api.pipewire.post-control-routing-inputg.description: Mute or unmute a routing path

api.playlists.get-stopgracefullyafterloo.name: get-stopgracefullyafterloop
api.playlists.get-stopgracefullyafterloo.description: Gracefully stop at end of loop

api.remoteAction.get-remoteaction.name: get-remoteaction
api.remoteAction.get-remoteaction.description: Proxy a command to remote FPP

command.help.name: help
command.help.description: Help for a specific FPP command.

command.preset.name: preset
command.preset.description: Trigger a command preset by name or slot number.

command.run.name: run
command.run.description: Run an FPP command by name with optional arguments.

config.set.name: set
config.set.description: Set a config value on the active/default target (or global contrib_enabled).

config.show.name: show
config.show.description: Show saved configuration and active connection.

dev.name: dev
dev.description: Triển khai Orange Pi / FPP — SSH, display, Docker, build (không dùng cho đổi nội dung hàng ngày).

dev.doctor.name: doctor
dev.doctor.description: Kiểm tra config, SSH, Docker, FPP API — gợi ý bước tiếp theo.

dev.fpp.name: fpp
dev.fpp.description: Cài đặt, build, deploy FPP Docker trên Orange Pi (SSH).

dev.fpp.bootstrap.name: bootstrap
dev.fpp.bootstrap.description: Greenfield: upload FPP source → install Docker → build → khởi động trên target.

dev.fpp.build.name: build
dev.fpp.build.description: Chạy make trong container (plugin FBMatrix hoặc all).

dev.fpp.deploy.name: deploy
dev.fpp.deploy.description: Upload file từ FPP source local → container (+ build + restart).

dev.fpp.down.name: down
dev.fpp.down.description: docker-compose down — dừng FPP trên target.

dev.fpp.install.name: install
dev.fpp.install.description: Tạo compose + media, pull image, docker-compose up -d.

dev.fpp.status.name: status
dev.fpp.status.description: Trạng thái compose, image, container, VirtualMatrix.

dev.fpp.virtual-matrix.set.name: set
dev.fpp.virtual-matrix.set.description: Cập nhật co-other.json + sync vào container.

dev.fpp.virtual-matrix.status.name: status
dev.fpp.virtual-matrix.status.description: Đọc invert, flipHorizontal, rotate, width, height.

dev.host.name: host
dev.host.description: SSH tới máy chạy FPP (Orange Pi) — màn hình, rotation, autostart.

dev.host.display.name: display
dev.host.display.description: Framebuffer / HDMI on the host (not FPP API).

dev.host.display.persist.name: persist
dev.host.display.persist.description: Giữ rotation sau reboot (systemd trên Orange Pi).

dev.host.display.persist.install.name: install
dev.host.display.persist.install.description: Cài systemd + script, bật portrait cố định sau reboot.

dev.host.display.persist.remove.name: remove
dev.host.display.persist.remove.description: Gỡ systemd persist và về landscape.

dev.host.display.rotate.name: rotate
dev.host.display.rotate.description: Rotate physical display via /sys/class/graphics/fb0/rotate (requires sudo on host).

dev.host.fpp.name: fpp
dev.host.fpp.description: FPP trên Orange Pi host (docker-compose, autostart).

dev.host.fpp.autostart.name: autostart
dev.host.fpp.autostart.description: Tự khởi động FPP docker khi Orange Pi boot.

dev.host.fpp.autostart.install.name: install
dev.host.fpp.autostart.install.description: Bật docker.service + systemd fpp-docker (docker-compose up -d khi boot).

dev.host.fpp.autostart.remove.name: remove
dev.host.fpp.autostart.remove.description: Gỡ systemd fpp-docker (container restart:always vẫn giữ trong compose).

dev.target.name: target
dev.target.description: Profile thiết bị target (FPP URL + SSH).

dev.target.init.name: init
dev.target.init.description: Lưu target profile (alias của target add).

doctor.name: doctor
doctor.description: Kiểm tra controller: Python, git, gh, config, contribute queue (+ tuỳ chọn target).

experience.name: experience
experience.description: Kinh nghiệm theo Target (device) và Player (FPP version).

experience.catalog.name: catalog
experience.catalog.description: Phân loại kinh nghiệm theo device_type + player_line.

experience.contribute.name: contribute
experience.contribute.description: Đóng góp kinh nghiệm từ máy user về repo (queue local → inbox PR).

experience.contribute.login.name: login
experience.contribute.login.description: Đăng nhập GitHub qua gh auth login (web browser).

experience.contribute.promote.name: promote
experience.contribute.promote.description: Copy queue pending vào ~/.cli-fpp/experiences.json (không cần PR).

experience.contribute.submit.name: submit
experience.contribute.submit.description: Gửi pending: --github (PR) hoặc ghi file inbox local.

experience.list.name: list
experience.list.description: Liệt kê kinh nghiệm theo 3 tầng: chung / riêng device / riêng player.

experience.remember.name: remember
experience.remember.description: Ghi nhớ — chọn tầng: chung / riêng device / riêng player.

experience.remove.name: remove
experience.remove.description: Xóa kinh nghiệm do user thêm (không xóa bundled).

guide.name: guide
guide.description: Hướng dẫn sử dụng FPP qua CLI và web UI.

guide.show.name: show
guide.show.description: Chi tiết hướng dẫn: start, playlist, volume, schedule, system, display.

guide.topics.name: topics
guide.topics.description: Liệt kê chủ đề hướng dẫn.

host.name: host
host.description: Chuyển tiếp `host …` → `dev host …` (tương thích script cũ).

media.name: media
media.description: Media and sequence files (file manager / playlist editor).

media.display-profile.name: display-profile
media.display-profile.description: Khung hiển thị thiết bị (SSH) — portrait/landscape, canvas fb0.

media.fetch.name: fetch
media.fetch.description: Tải ảnh từ URL về local (để agent upload sau).

media.prepare-images.name: prepare-images
media.prepare-images.description: Rotate + resize ảnh local trước khi upload FPP.

media.prepare-videos.name: prepare-videos
media.prepare-videos.description: Transpose + scale video (ffmpeg) trước khi upload FPP.

media.propose.name: propose
media.propose.description: Kiểm tra thiết bị + ảnh (file/URL) → đề xuất xoay trước upload (không upload).

media.upload.name: upload
media.upload.description: Chuẩn bị (propose → transpose) rồi upload ảnh/video lên FPP (file, folder hoặc URL).

overlays.stop.name: stop
overlays.stop.description: Stop all effects on an overlay model.

ping.name: ping
ping.description: Check connectivity to the FPP instance.

player.name: player
player.description: Player status — what is playing now (index.php).

repl.name: repl
repl.description: Interactive REPL (default when no subcommand given).

suggest.name: suggest
suggest.description: Đọc prompt tự nhiên → đề xuất lệnh CLI + cách làm trên web UI + câu confirm.

target.name: target
target.description: Quản lý nhiều thiết bị FPP từ máy client (remote).

target.add.name: add
target.add.description: Thêm/cập nhật target (FPP URL + SSH cho dev).

target.audit.name: audit
target.audit.description: Kiểm tra phiên bản FPP trên tất cả target-device.

target.catalog.name: catalog
target.catalog.description: Phân loại Target (thiết bị) + Player (FPP version).

target.device-types.name: device-types
target.device-types.description: Danh sách loại thiết bị Target hỗ trợ.

target.list.name: list
target.list.description: Liệt kê target đã lưu + default/active.

target.setup.name: setup
target.setup.description: Briefing: số target đang quản lý → thêm (batch/từng cái) → kiểm tra FPP.

target.show.name: show
target.show.description: Xem profile một target (mặc định: active/default).

target.use.name: use
target.use.description: Chọn target mặc định (lưu vào config).
